name: io.github.opengolfapi/mcp-server
description: Every US golf course for AI agents — search, scorecards, tees, weather, nearby — plus contribute shots & moments to the open OpenShot standard. ODbL/CC0 open data.

environmentVariables.name: OPENGOLFAPI_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Optional free key (courses.opengolfapi.org/api-keys) — enables contributing shots & moments. Read tools work without it.
